mapper.sql: id, record_id, deduction_id, class_id, appellant_id, appellant_name, appellant_role, appeal_reason, appeal_evidence, status, handler_id, handler_name, handle_time, handle_result, original_score, adjusted_score, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM check_record_appeals_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM check_record_appeals_new WHERE deduction_id = #{deductionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM check_record_appeals_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM check_record_appeals_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND status IN (0, 1) ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE check_record_appeals_new SET status = 1, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{appealId} AND status = 0

UPDATE check_record_appeals_new SET status = 2, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, handle_time = NOW(), handle_result = #{handleResult}, adjusted_score = #{adjustedScore}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE check_record_appeals_new SET status = 3, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, handle_time = NOW(), handle_result = #{handleResult}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
